integration.frame_gate: video_info.libretro_running with valid game and viewport geometry
integration.presentation_aspect: live rendered viewport width divided by height

phases.after: final GL2 or GL3 renderchain draw
phases.before: RetroArch overlays, menu, widgets, and OSD

phases.after: RetroArch overlays, menu, widgets, and OSD

doc.boundary: GL2 and GL3 submit the completed game viewport to the game phase, draw all RetroArch UI and OSD normally, then submit the same frame to the post-UI phase immediately before RetroArch swaps. Both calls run regardless of RetroArch menu state.
doc.evidence: Package linkage, patch application, exact phase order, and forbidden-symbol absence are source gates. Real game pixels and physical composition remain runtime gates.
